MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-24-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SVETLANA SAMARINA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. DEFENDANT SVETLANA SAMARINA REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE HAS TWO CHILDREN WHICH WERE NOT INCLUDED IN HER WAIVER APPLICATION. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUN-18-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
